The Spanish-American War was fought starting on 1898-04-25.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?start_date WHERE {
  wd:Q12583 wdt:P580 ?start_date .
}
```

| start_date                          |
| ----------------------------------- |
| 1898-04-25T00:00:00Z (xsd:dateTime) |
